title: Sweet Spicy Irish Pineapple Skillet
description: A peppery and energizing Irish dish featuring pineapple chunks, render fat, and ayurvedic sattvic friendly ingredients, this skillet is perfect for a weeknight dinner. The combination of sweet and spicy flavors will leave you wanting more.
instructions: Heat the rendered pork fat in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the pineapple chunks and cook until they are caramelized and tender.
Add the irish whiskey, honey, ginger powder, black pepper, and sea salt to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes or until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the chopped fresh cilantro and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the sweet spicy irish pineapple skillet hot over rice or with some crusty bread.
